# rank / storage

The **rank** type's storage capability: contributes `Fields.Storage` (server
runtime) mapping the `rank` field token to the `rank_text` Postgres domain
column via `build(name) => rankText(name)`. Resolved by exact token through
`resolveFieldStorage("rank")`.

## Plugin reference

- Description: Rank field type: DB storage capability — maps to the rank_text (C-collation) Postgres domain column.
- Server:
  - Uses: `fields.Fields`
  - DB schema: `plugins/fields/plugins/rank/plugins/storage/server/internal/storage.test.ts`
